# host_group (Resource)

Manages a local host group.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "host_group" "developers" {
  name = "developers"
}

data "host_group" "admin" {
  role = "admin"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) Local group name.

### Read-Only

- `gid` (String) Numeric group ID as reported by the operating system.
- `id` (String) Resource identifier, equal to `name`.
